title: VirtualPump
body:
This MOD submerges the world in water.

[日本語](https://github.com/YukkuriLaboratory/VirtualWater/blob/main/README.md)

> Note:
> 
> This MOD submerges the entire world in water, so it will have a significant impact on terrain generation.  It's recommended to generate the world in advance using tools like [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) before playing.  
> The brightness underwater is always at 0, so it's advisable to use night vision effects or introduce a [resource pack with equivalent effects](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fullbright-ub).  
> The Nether bedrock area will not be completely submerged for performance reasons.

↓↓ Showcase(JP) ↓↓

 [![動画](http://img.youtube.com/vi/1N9_36BgHZk/0.jpg)](https://youtube.com/shorts/1N9_36BgHZk?si=cj1rzV8dRO7AwaPZ)


Created for [Siu](https://www.youtube.com/@siu_lab)'s 2023 summer project, "Cooking Life in a Submerged World."(JP)

↓↓ You can find the main content here ↓↓

[![動画](http://img.youtube.com/vi/9byKpZSy35M/0.jpg)](https://youtu.be/9byKpZSy35M&list=PLAk_kz3mvfCuUaGz4e2ULsQ5bg_7A5SYH)
